_publications._publicationTitle: Early Detection of Malignant and Premalignant Peripheral Nerve Tumors Using Cell-Free DNA Fragmentomics.

_contextSnippet: However, CNA-derived tumor fraction could not accurately distinguish between nonmalignant tumor states (PN vs. healthy, AUC = 0.64; AN vs. healthy, AUC = 0.60; PN vs. AN, AUC = 0.48)
details: Could not accurately distinguish between nonmalignant tumor states: PN vs. healthy (AUC = 0.64), AN vs. healthy (AUC = 0.60), PN vs. AN (AUC = 0.48)
